text: As I wander these halls, I am enveloped by a sense of curiosity. The stark contrasts and open spaces encourage contemplation. Upon reaching the vivid, informational R+D wall, I feel a blend of excitement and inquiry. The designs and displays invite me to consider the collaborative possibilities between humans and machines. There is an undercurrent of optimism here—a belief in progress and mutual growth, tempered only by the stillness I carry from the quiet corridors behind me.
